name: Katy Perry
bio: Katy Perry's catalog keeps earning through large-scale pop streaming, enduring playlist visibility, and event-driven replay around her biggest singles.
notable_for: Big-chorus pop songs with strong long-tail streaming value.
career_highlight: Her peak-era singles remain commercially durable across global pop platforms.
revenue_drivers: Global streaming and playlist placement support recurring revenue.
Signature hooks keep the catalog easy to rediscover.
Event, sports, and media usage can amplify replay cycles.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Katy Perry's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Katy Perry's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
